metadata.claims_conservative_note: This phase estimates checker-sensitive scale trends under available local execution only. When provider/model access is missing, deterministic proxy behavior is substituted.
metadata.proxy_annotation: Deterministic proxy tier simulation was used for one or more tiers; treat rates as local proxy diagnostics, not real model leaderboard claims.
